info.title: IBAN Confirmation
info.description:
This Service confirms the holder of an IBAN by sending an IBAN and verification value. The response returns if the IBAN and UID sent match and if the account is active and the full information needed to Initiate a payment which helps in reducing the rejection rate of payments on different systems


![JOF1](https://www.jopacc.com/sites/default/files/2023-12/jpc-internal-jof-banner.png)

---

**_This is the initial draft of the Jordan Open Finance specification_**

The services in this Open API specification are Direct-Call Services (DCS). These services can be accessed by direct calls to the banks or by using an aggregator central hub such as JoPACC. However, the URLs and routes for these services are designed for direct-calls only.

- For the Open API specification of the aggregated services, refer to the Aggregator Services specification.

Services in Jordan Open Finance Specification (JOF) are divided into 4 categories based on their content and nature of consent.

# **Account Information Services (AIS)**
This category covers services that are related to customers' financial accounts. This category has two sub-categories:

1. **MY AIS**: Services that allow an account holder to view their own information. For a TPP to retrieve this information, they require the consent of the user.

2. **Others AIS**: Services that enable a TPP to view the account information of a user who is not their customer and who hasn't initiated the request. These services require the user whose information is being retrieved to have consented, such as the IBAN Confirmation service.


An IBAN (International Bank Account Number) confirmation service is a tool used to verify the validity and ownership of an IBAN. This service checks that the IBAN is correctly formatted, valid according to international standards, and belongs to the intended account holder. Doing so helps prevent errors in transactions, ensures payments are sent to the correct accounts, and reduces the risk of fraud. This service is particularly useful in financial transactions, where the accuracy and security of bank account information are crucial.

This service is related to the "Others AIS" sub-category 

### **Overview**
---

**IBAN Confirmation Service** confirms the holder of an IBAN by sending an IBAN and verification value. The response returns if the IBAN and UID sent match and if the account is active and the full information needed to Initiate a payment which helps in reducing the rejection rate of payments on different systems. Also minimizing the chance of sending a transfer to the incorrect recipient.

#### **IBAN Confirmation Services** 

**1. Get IBAN Confirmation verification**

### **Endpoint** 
---

### **GET /institution/ibanConf**

#### **Get IBAN Confirmation verification:** This service validates International Bank Account Numbers (IBANs) for accuracy and reliability in financial transactions.


|     | Resource          | Method | EndPoint                    |
| --- | ----------------- | ------ | --------------------------- |
| 1   | IBAN Confirmation | GET    | /institution/ibanConf       |

### **Parameters**
---
The table below outlines the inputs or configurations required for invoking the service. 

|     | ParameterName | Required/Optional | Description                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                
| --- | ------------- | ----------------- |---------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| 1   | accountType   | Required          | Account type of the inquired                                                    |  
| 2   | accountId     | Required          | Account identification of the inquired. Scheme decided by the accountType       |       
| 3   | uidType       | Required          | Unique Identifier's type of the inquired, such as National ID or Passport Number|   
| 4   | uidValue      | Required          | Unique Identifier of the inquired. Scheme decided by the uidType                |   

### **Headers**
---
The table below lists the HTTP headers that can be included in requests to provide additional information or configuration. 

|     | HeaderName            | Required/Optional | Description                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| --- | --------------------- | ----------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| 1   | Authorization         | Required          | This header typically carries credentials, such as tokens or keys, allowing the server to authenticate the client's request and determine whether it has permission to access the requested resource. |
| 2   | x-interactions-id     | Required          | This header is not a standard HTTP header, but it is used as a unique id for the interaction, used in all requests and responses that are related                                                     |
| 3   | x-idempotency-key     | Required          | A unique identifier used to ensure idempotent API requests, preventing duplicate actions when the same request is made multiple times.                                                                |
| 4   | x-financial-id        | Optional          | A custom header potentially used in financial APIs to convey specific transaction or account identifiers.                                                                                             |
| 5   | x-jws-signature       | Required          | A custom header indicating the presence of a JSON Web Signature (JWS) for verifying the authenticity and integrity of API requests.                                                                   |
| 6   | x-auth-date           | Optional          | A custom header used to indicate the date and time of authentication in API requests for security and audit trail purposes.   |                                                                     

#
    
## **UML Diagram**
---

![JOF1](https://www.jopacc.com/sites/default/files/2024-05/iban_confirmation_couaum.png)


### **Data Dictionary**
---
The tables below represent the API service fields and serve as a comprehensive reference detailing the meaning, format, and usage of each field, ensuring a consistent understanding of the service. 

####
#### **Get IBAN Confirmation verification**


| #   | Name                   | Data Type           | JSON Path                     | Description                                                               |
| --- | ---------------------- | ------------------  | ----------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| 1   | getIbanConf            | N/A                 | N/A                           | Retrieves IBAN confirmation status and details.                           |
| 2   | iban confirmation      | N/A                 | N/A                           | Confirmation status of the IBAN.                                          |
| 3   | status                 | enum                | status                        | Status of the IBAN (e.g., active).                                        |
| 4   | currencies             | array               | currencies                    | Supported currencies for the IBAN.                                        |
| 5   | institutionBasicInfo   | object(ComplexType) | institutionBasicInfo          | Basic information about the banking institution.                          |
| 6   | lockedForCredit        | boolean             | lockedForCredit               | Indicates whether the IBAN is locked for credit.                          |
| 7   | lockedForDebit         | boolean             | lockedForDebit                | Indicates whether the IBAN is locked for debit.                           |
| 8   | accountOwner           | object(ComplexType) | accountOwner                  | Information about the owner of the IBAN.                                  |
| 9   | additionalInformation  | string              | additionalInformation         | Additional notes or information about the IBAN.                           |


### **Complex Types Dictionary**

---

The tables below represent a structured overview of composite data structures utilized within the API, detailing their constituent attributes and relationships.


#### **institutionBasicInfoComplexType** 

|  Info.                 |                                                                                                              |
|------------------------|--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------| 
| **Description**        | A complex type containing basic information about an institution.                                            |     
| **Used in**            | institutionBasicInfo                                                                                         |
| **JSON Path**          | institutionBasicInfo                                                                                         |  

#####
##### **_institutionBasicInfoComplexType in details_** 

| *  | **Field**               |  Data Type                | **JSON Path**                                                                           |   **Description**                                                        |
| ---|-------------------------|---------------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|--------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| 1  |institutionType          | enum                      | institutionBasicInfo.institutionType                                                    |The type or category of the institution                                   |                                                                   
| 2  |institutionIdentification| object                    | institutionBasicInfo.institutionIdentification                                          |Identification information associated with the institution.               |
| 2.1|schema                   | string                    | institutionBasicInfo.institutionIdentification.schema                                   |The schema or structure of institution identification.                    |
| 2.2|address                  | string                    | institutionBasicInfo.institutionIdentification.address                                  |The address associated with the institution.                              |
| 3  |name                     | object(ComplexType)       | institutionBasicInfo.name                                                               |The name or title of the institution.                                     | 
| 4  |contact                  | object(ComplexType)       | institutionBasicInfo.contact                                                            |The contact phone number of the institution.                              |

|    |                 |                           | accountOwner.name.enName                                                           |The account Owner English Name                                              |
| 2  |arName           | string                    | institutionBasicInfo.name.arName                                                   |The institution Arabic Name                                                 |
|    |                 |                           | accountOwner.name.arName                                                           |The account Owner Arabic Name                                               |
| 3  |tradeName        | object                    | institutionBasicInfo.name.tradeName                                                |The institution trade or business name associated with a product or entity  |
| 3.1|enName           | string                    | institutionBasicInfo.name.tradeName.enName                                         |The institution English name of the trade or business.                      |

#
---


####
#### **addressComplexType**

| Info.           |                                                          |
| --------------- | -------------------------------------------------------- |
| **Description** | A complex type containing information about the address. |
| **Used in**     | accountOwner                                             |
| **JSON Path**   | accountOwner.address                                     |

#####

##### **_addressComplexType in details_**

| \*  | **Field**    | Data Type | **JSON Path**                                | **Description**                                |
| --- | ------------ | --------- | -------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------- |
| 1   | addresslines | array     | accountOwner.address.addressLines            | The address lines of the account owner.        |
| 2   | city         | string    | accountOwner.address.city                    | The city of the account owner.                 |
| 3   | state        | string    | accountOwner.address.state                   | The state of the account owner.                |
| 4   | postcode     | string    | accountOwner.address.postcode                | The postcode of the account owner              |
| 5   | phoneNumber  | string    | accountOwner.address.phoneNumber             | The phone number of the account owner          |
| 6   | website      | string    | accountOwner.address.website                 | The website of the account owner               |
| 7   | moreInfo     | string    | accountOwner.address.moreInfo                | Additional information about the account owner |
| 8   | countryInfo  | object    | accountOwner.address.countryInfo             | The country information of the account owner   |
| 8.1 | countryCode  | object    | accountOwner.address.countryInfo.countryCode | The country code of the account owner          |
| 8.2 | countryName  | object    | accountOwner.address.countryInfo.countryName | The country name of the account owner          |
| 9   | location     | object    | accountOwner.address.location                | The location of the account owner              |
| 9.1 | latitude     | number    | accountOwner.address.location.latitude       | The latitude of the account owner              |
| 9.2 | longitude    | number    | accountOwner.address.location.longitude      | The longitude of the account owner             |

The Central Bank of Jordan has classified Open Finance consent into Account Information consent and Payment Initiation consent. The above categories are based on the CBJ's classifications and divide them further for the user's convenience.

Some useful links:

- [About JoPACC](https://jopacc.com)

get.description: Confirm the holder of an IBAN by sending an IBAN and verification value. The response returns if the IBAN and UID sent match and if the account is active.

parameters.name: accountId
parameters.description: Account identification of the inquired. Scheme decided by the accountType

parameters.name: uidType
parameters.description: Unique Identifier's type of the inquired, such as National ID or Passport Number

parameters.name: uidValue
parameters.description: Unique Identifier of the inquired. Scheme decided by the uidType

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: Authorization header in which the token is placed

parameters.name: x-interactions-id
parameters.description: Unique id for the interaction, used in all request and responses that are related

parameters.name: x-idempotency-key
parameters.description: Unique id that is generated for each request and response. Used for tracking and to check for duplicate calls

parameters.name: x-financial-id
parameters.description: Unique id for the Financial Institution; BIC or Pseudo-BIC code of the sender

parameters.name: x-jws-signature
parameters.description: JWS Signature, refer to security reference

parameters.name: x-auth-date
parameters.description: Date and time of the last authentication of the User by the TPP
